query: PostgreSQL operational complexity managed services RDS vs self-hosted
answer: Managed services like AWS RDS reduce operational complexity but can be more costly than self-hosted PostgreSQL. Self-hosted offers more control and lower costs but requires more management effort.

results.title: Self-Hosting Postgres vs RDS: The $379/Month Lie | byteiota
results.snippet: When you run the actual numbers including all fees, managed services often cost 5-10x self-hosting, not 2-3x. The pricing opacity is intentional

results.title: RDS or self-managed PostgreSQL? : r/aws - Reddit
results.snippet: If you prefer to pay AWS to manage a relational DB for you, RDS is probably what you want.
